user.title: Hargassner Control
user.description: Enter your Hargassner Connect account credentials. The OAuth configuration and installation ID are discovered automatically.

select_installation.title: Select Installation
select_installation.description: Found {count} installations on this account. Select the boiler to integrate.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Hargassner Connect portal. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your Hargassner Connect credentials.
error.secret_extraction_failed: Could not read the OAuth configuration from /js/app.js. The JS structure may have changed — please open a GitHub issue.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Hargassner account is already configured.

init.title: Update Credentials
init.description: Update your Hargassner Connect account credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Hargassner Connect portal.
error.secret_extraction_failed: Could not read the OAuth configuration from /js/app.js.
